step_rationale: sPLA-III implicated in atherosclerosis; generates lipid mediators and oxidized phospholipids in plaque.
mechanism: Phospholipase A2 isoform generating pro-inflammatory lipid mediators and oxidized phospholipids during atherosclerotic plaque inflammation.

references.title: Group IID, IIE, IIF and III secreted phospholipase As.
references.journal: Biochimica et biophysica acta. Molecular and cell biology of lipids
